backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Arena platform implementing user profiles, content metadata, playback queues, likes, and comments with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state by converting playback queues from arrays to linked lists while preserving all other state fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features (delete profile and delete content) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file for build planning and documentation purposes.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with Feed, Upload, and ContentDetail routes, and conditionally renders a profile setup modal for new authenticated users.
Comments section component that fetches, displays, and allows adding or deleting comments, resolving author display names via per-principal profile queries.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationDial: Reusable AlertDialog wrapper component for destructive or confirmatory actions, supporting a pending/loading state and customizable labels and styling.
frontend/src/components/ContentCard.tsx: Renders a media content card with thumbnail, file type badge, and action buttons (like, add to queue, comments, delete). Handles navigation to content detail page and owner-only delete with confirmation dialog.
A drag-and-drop file input component that supports audio, video, and image categories, displaying a file preview with name/size and a clear button once a file is selected.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with logo, navigation links, queue button with badge, and auth controls, wrapping page content with a playback queue panel.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, showing a loading spinner during login and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MediaPlayer.tsx: A media player component supporting audio and video playback with controls for play/pause, seek, volume, repeat, skip, and next-track, rendering either a video element or an audio player with album art.
frontend/src/components/ProfileMenu.tsx: Dropdown menu for authenticated users showing their display name with options to view profile and delete account, including a confirmation dialog before permanent profile deletion.
frontend/src/components/QueuePanel.tsx: A slide-in panel component that displays the playback queue, allowing users to reorder, remove, or clear queued media items with navigation to individual content pages.
frontend/src/components/ThumbnailCreator: A component for creating content thumbnails either by capturing a frame from a video at a seekable position or by uploading an image file, with preview support.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, content CRUD, uploads, comments, and playback queue management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the Arena dark theme via CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens), Tailwind directives, and utility classes for neon glow effects and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/ContentDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single content item's detail view with media playback, like/queue/delete actions, view tracking, and a toggleable comments section. Handles owner-specific controls and queue-based next-content navigation.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Renders the main content feed with a hero banner, filter tabs (all/music/video), sort modes (recent/popular), and a search bar, displaying content cards with uploader names and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter an artist/creator name on first login, saving the profile via the backend mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Provides a form for uploading media files (audio/video) with title, description, thumbnail capture, and progress tracking, detecting file type automatically before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/videoFrameCapture.ts: Exports a single async function that captures the current frame of an HTMLVideoElement as a PNG Blob using an offscreen canvas.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom Arena-themed color tokens, neon box-shadow utilities, display/body font families, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for 'The Arena', recording two pending features: delete profile (with confirmation and redirect) and delete content button (owner-only, with confirmation and feed removal).
